summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of the Bark&Bond Melbourne dog-trainers OS. 31/31 backend pytest cases pass (after one small fix). All public flows (home, directory, trainer detail + lead form, AI matcher with Claude Sonnet 4.5, submit form, pricing, SEO autogen) and admin flows (passcode gate, 8 dashboard tabs, CRUD on trainers/leads/submissions/A-B tests/SEO/seed/analytics/health/audit) work end-to-end against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.

minor.issue: FIXED by testing agent — original route used `{slug}` which 404s for slugs containing `/` (e.g. `fitzroy/puppy-school`). Changed to `{slug:path}`. Verified passing.

issues: The 'OPERATING PRINCIPLE' callout card overlaps the LISTING INTEGRITY ENGINE caption baked into the hero image, partially obscuring the line 'Only X of Y listings carry a verified confidence score.' Consider repositioning the card or adding a backdrop.
A/B tests tab has data-testid `admin-tab-a/b-tests` (contains a slash) which complicates CSS attr selectors. Recommend `admin-tab-ab-tests`. Functional but harms automation.

action_items: Optional: tweak hero card position so it doesn't overlay the integrity caption text in the photo
Optional: rename A/B tests tab data-testid from `admin-tab-a/b-tests` to `admin-tab-ab-tests` for safer selectors
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is approaching 800 lines — consider splitting public, admin, and seed routes into separate routers for maintainability.
Admin auth is a static passcode echoed back in the /api/admin/login response (`'passcode': expected`). Returning the secret is unnecessary and a small surface-area leak; just return `{ok: true}`.

/admin/seed startup auto-seeds without verifying that the AI service is reachable; if Claude is rate-limited at boot all 12 listings fall back to heuristic only — acceptable but should be logged loudly.
/api/admin/ab-tests PATCH replaces results dict (PUT-style) — not destructive yet because results aren't user-managed, but worth documenting.
seed_data_creation: DB auto-seeded at startup with 12 Melbourne trainers; backend tests created TEST_-prefixed leads, submissions and A/B test entries; submission/trainer test fixtures cleaned up via the delete endpoint where applicable. Some TEST_ leads remain to verify analytics counters.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is the regression baseline. AI calls (match, SEO, verify) take 5-30s — keep timeouts ≥60s. _id is correctly scrubbed everywhere. The auto-seed runs once when trainers collection is empty; subsequent /api/admin/seed calls are idempotent (skip-by-name). Frontend uses data-testid extensively (lead-name, lead-email, lead-phone, lead-description, lead-goals, matcher-description, submit-*, admin-pass-input, admin-tab-*). Admin route is /admin (login) → /admin/dashboard.
